test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: Missing Peg/GI Information

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition using a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL). Ensure peg/GI information is missing. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected due to missing info.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected due to missing info and email is received stating rejection and reasons.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL
Check email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to PEG/GL info missing

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: Blank BP or Employee Supplier

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition using a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL). Ensure business partner is blank or set to EMPloyee. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected after buyer review.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected after buyer review with email notification stating reasons.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL
Ensure business partner is blank or set to EMPloyee
Check email stating requisition is rejected after buyer review

test_cases.summary: Subcontract, Default Item Not Linked to Production Order

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition using a SubConDefault item not linked to production order. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification stating item not linked to production order.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with SubConDefault item not linked to production order
Check email stating requisition is rejected due to item not linked to production order

description.scenario: Create a Purchase requisition with multiple lines, some with subcontracted items. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected with email notification stating multi-line subcontracted items.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with multiple lines, some with subcontracted items
Check email stating requisition is rejected due to multi-line subcontracted items

description.scenario: Create standard purchase requisition. Submit for approval through BPMS015. Approve requisition. Convert to purchase order.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition approved and converted to purchase order.

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Requisition Approval with Valid Data

description.scenario: Create subcontracted purchase requisition with valid peg/GI information, valid BP, and linked to production order. Submit for approval through BPMS015. Approve requisition. Convert to purchase order.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition approved and converted to purchase order.

steps.action: Create subcontracted purchase requisition with valid peg/GI information, valid BP, and linked to production order

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Requisition Approval with Multi-line Valid Items

description.scenario: Create subcontracted purchase requisition with multiple lines, all with valid subcontracted items. Submit for approval through BPMS015. Approve requisition. Convert to purchase order.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition approved and converted to purchase order.

steps.action: Create subcontracted purchase requisition with multiple lines, all with valid subcontracted items
